ogTitle: Warragul vs Warragul South: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Warragul and Warragul South.
heading: Warragul vs Warragul South — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Warragul, Victoria and Warragul South, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Warragul South has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Warragul (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Warragul or Warragul South safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Warragul has a flood risk score of 57/100, while Warragul South scores 41/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Warragul scores 37/100 for bushfire risk. Warragul South scores 34/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Warragul or Warragul South?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Warragul South has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.35% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
